prompt: Create a richly detailed anime-style fantasy illustration of an Alice in Wonderland tea party in a sunlit Victorian glass conservatory. The scene has Alice seated in the center on an ornate turquoise tufted armchair, wearing a classic pale blue dress with puff sleeves, a white apron, and a black hair ribbon, with long flowing blonde hair; her face is covered by a flat beige square censor block. She is holding exactly 2 teacups, one raised near her mouth and one resting on a saucer in her other hand. Surround her with exactly 3 Wonderland companions: a white rabbit on the left in a navy blue tailcoat, gold waistcoat, red bow tie, white gloves, and a pocket watch; a grinning gray striped Cheshire cat floating in midair above the chair with bright teal eyes and curled tail; and the Mad Hatter on the right in a dark green coat, bow tie, gloves, and a tall black top hat with a visible paper card reading 10/6, his face also covered by a flat beige square censor block. The table in the foreground is crowded with an elegant afternoon tea service: exactly 3 large floral porcelain teapots or lidded pots, exactly 5 visible teacups with saucers, exactly 2 tiered dessert stands, and numerous cakes, tarts, cookies, macarons, and berries arranged on ornate plates. Use lush roses, ivy, antique clocks, gold trim, porcelain patterns, and soft bokeh details throughout the background. Through the tall window behind them, show a bright fairytale garden and distant whimsical castle towers under a blue sky. Lighting should be warm, sparkling, and painterly, with ultra-detailed fabric, fur, porcelain, pastries, and flowers, in a polished Japanese anime illustration style with cinematic composition and high fantasy atmosphere.
